bom.Recommended Specification: Steel rule, fixture and alignment tools

features.Acceptance Test: Within 2% of reference at 3 RPM points

tests.Method: Compare at idle and 3 RPM points

calibrations.Procedure: Apply known voltages and fit correction
Measure sensor and axle through stroke

risks.Mitigation: Hardware TX-disable; disconnect during PV3 flash
TVS, reverse protection, fuse, wide-input converter
Master timestamp, GNSS sync, validity flags
Separate bypassed module, hard timer, physical disable

bike_profiles.ECU Channels Targeted: RPM, TPS, coolant, gear, battery, speed, DTC
RPM, speed, coolant, gear/neutral, battery, switches/status

software.Definition of Done: No missed critical samples under stress

decisions.Impact: Both K-line and CAN on core PCB

decisions.Decision: Rev A read-only; no ignition/injector outputs
Lap timer expansion; active cruise separate
decisions.Reason: Lap uses existing sensors; cruise is safety-critical
